name: Noodle Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water until tender.
2. Drain the noodles and mix them with all ingredients except Grape-Nuts in a bowl.
3. Spray a 9 x 13 pan with Pam cooking spray.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle Grape-Nuts evenly over the top of the pudding.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
